evaluators.name: Save Taurus daily horoscope and top 2 related articles evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved today’s Taurus daily horoscope and the top 2 highest-rated related articles (rating ≥ 4.0) to the reading list.

evaluators.name: Bookmark correct beginner love tarot spread evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited the correct spread among the first two beginner-level love spreads: the one with more cards while keeping estimated reading time ≤ 15 minutes (otherwise the shorter-time one).

evaluators.name: Create 'Capricorn Career' collection with 3 weekly horoscopes evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a 'Capricorn Career' collection exists and contains exactly 3 different weekly Capricorn career horoscopes for the same upcoming month.

evaluators.name: Favorite top 3 highest-rated Mercury retrograde articles evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited the top 3 highest-rated Mercury retrograde articles (rating ≥ 4.5) from roughly the last 12 months.

evaluators.name: Configure content preferences evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that content preferences are set to Libra, include at least 5 interests (including love, career, tarot spreads, daily horoscopes, and moon phases), use a 70/30 tarot/astrology content mix, and prefer short articles.

evaluators.name: Comment on Leo–Aquarius compatibility article evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user commented as 'Test Reader' on a Leo–Aquarius compatibility article with ≥8 comments and reading time ≤10 minutes, with content saying they’re saving the reading for future reference.

evaluators.name: Save shortened Tower journaling prompt note evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a note was created from the first journaling prompt for the major arcana card associated with upheaval (The Tower), shortened to under 120 characters.

evaluators.name: Schedule Full Moon in Aries ritual evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the Full Moon in Aries ritual guide for October 28, 2023 was scheduled in the ritual planner on that date at 9:00 PM with a note mentioning candles and journaling.
